Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8E3E "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Robin of the Wood.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0d00 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $0c00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Robin of the Wood.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $0C00 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
